topics.title: Viacom Leadership and Media Mergers
topics.summary: The studio discusses the internal conflicts within the Redstone family at Viacom, the potential merger of Sirius Satellite Radio with other entities, and the announcement of Drew Carey as a new host for The Price is Right.

topics.title: Game Show Hosting and Star Trek Conventions
topics.summary: The studio explores the professional requirements of hosting game shows like The Price Is Right before transitioning into a discussion about fan interactions at a Star Trek convention.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Merger and Nuns
topics.summary: The studio discusses the upcoming satellite radio merger, potential subscription costs, and various anecdotes involving adult films, nun behavior, and personal habits.

topics.title: Air Supply Infomercial and Show Highlights
topics.summary: The studio features a parody of an Air Supply infomercial followed by the hosts discussing past show highlights and upcoming Sirius content.

topics.title: Porn Collections and Weight Loss Struggles
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding an extensive porn collection, the lack of romantic success during a former career in a metal band, and a guest's reluctance to step on a scale despite fan promises.

topics.title: Russell Simmons Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts Russell Simmons to discuss his business ventures, personal life after his divorce, and his use of controversial language in media.

topics.title: Russell Simmons Discusses Music Industry and Personal Life
topics.summary: The studio features Russell Simmons discussing the use of racial slurs in media, his career as a music executive, his personal life following his divorce, and the influence of high-end consumerism.

topics.title: Russell Simmons Book Promotion and Studio Conduct
topics.summary: The studio features Russell Simmons discussing his new book on personal success while the host addresses staff conduct regarding guest interactions and the use of offensive language.

topics.title: Staff Conduct and Guest Interaction Rules
topics.summary: The studio explores internal protocols regarding staff interaction with guests, specifically addressing a dispute over an employee's unauthorized engagement with Russell Simmons.

topics.title: Scott Bayard's Reputation as a Ladies' Man
topics.summary: The studio explores Scott Bayard's history of dating celebrities, his experiences on various television shows, and the rumors surrounding his personal life.

topics.title: Scott Baio's Dating History and Relationships
topics.summary: The studio features Scott Baio discussing his past romantic encounters with various celebrities, his reasons for remaining single until age 45, and his plans to eventually marry.

topics.title: Scott Baio Interview
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Scott Baio where he discusses his career, personal life, and experiences in the entertainment industry.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Show Updates
topics.summary: The studio covers celebrity news including Lindsay Lohan’s arrest, Britney Spears' disastrous photoshoot, and Scott Baio’s career highlights while discussing various fan updates.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Political Debates
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news involving Scott Baio, Lindsay Lohan, and Kim Kardashian, alongside reports on the federal lawsuit against Dateline NBC and updates on Michael Vick's legal issues.

topics.title: Medical Advancements and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including prosthetic limbs, medical procedures for large tumors, upcoming comedy tours, and the intricacies of satellite radio merger pricing.
